programs.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: In Plymouth, Caroline and Steve plan a complex Middle Eastern menu. Jade and Seb make some schoolboy errors. And Bev and Nick serve up a shellfish platter, even though Bev hates seafood.

programs.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programs.desc: The fourth member of the Keane family arrives. Cleo struggles with guilt. Pearl tries to build bridges between torn families. And Diane confides in Tony and Leela.

programs.title: Countdown
programs.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programs.title: Cheers
programs.desc: Carla tells Cliff he's on to a sure thing with Diane, so he invites Diane to the postman's ball, hoping to make a move. Will she attend - or will Carla go.

programs.title: Cheers
programs.desc: After one dinner date, Frasier announces he's getting married. The regulars agree it's a bad idea, but what can they do about it.

programs.title: Cheers
programs.desc: Norm struggles with his conscience when he hears gossip that could win him a promotion by wrecking the chances of the other candidate.
